examples.title: Suffix Trie Construction
examples.description: Algorithm to build suffix trie from input string
examples.code:
FUNCTION build_suffix_trie(s):
    root = Node()
    FOR i FROM 0 TO LENGTH(s)-1:
        current = root
        FOR j FROM i TO LENGTH(s)-1:
            char = s[j]
            IF char NOT IN current.children:
                current.children[char] = Node()
            current = current.children[char]
    RETURN root
examples.explanation: Iterates through all suffixes, adding each character to trie
